subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! The effect of thy pen hath been noted. I cherish the hope that the pages of vision shall at last come into view [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان اثر خامه ملاحظه گشت امیدوارم که اوراق رویا عاقبت بنظر اید
subcodes.subjects: @interpretation of dreams and visions, @consolation and comfort, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
